[90mstdout[2m | src/tests/vendors.test.ts[2m > [22m[2mVendor Management Integration Tests[2m > [22m[2mGET /api/vendors/:id/performance-history[2m > [22m[2mshould return monthly aggregates for the vendor
[22m[39mprisma:query -- Implicit "COMMIT" query via underlying driver

[90mstdout[2m | src/tests/vendors.test.ts[2m > [22m[2mVendor Management Integration Tests[2m > [22m[2mGET /api/vendors/:id/performance-history[2m > [22m[2mshould return monthly aggregates for the vendor
[22m[39mprisma:query 
    SELECT
      YEAR(order_date)  AS yr,
      MONTH(order_date) AS mo,
      COUNT(crm_order_id) AS total_orders,
      SUM(CASE WHEN order_vendor_feedback = 'Positive' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS positive_orders,
      SUM(CASE WHEN order_vendor_feedback = 'Negative' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS negative_orders
    FROM crm_orders
    WHERE
      order_vendor_id = ?
      -- Void ('5') included: vendor was booked and charge was captured (same-day reversal).
      -- Cancel Order ('6') excluded: no charge ever processed, vendor was not involved.
      AND sale_status IN ('1', '2', '3', '4', '5')
      AND order_date IS NOT NULL
    GROUP BY YEAR(order_date), MONTH(order_date)
    ORDER BY yr DESC, mo DESC

[22m[39mprisma:query DELETE FROM `crm_orders` WHERE `crm_orders`.`crm_order_id` IN (?,?)
